/usr/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/engine_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/engine_test.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_test.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_test.dir/src/player/Player.cpp.o -o engine_test  voxel_engine/libVoxelEngine.a voxel_engine/dependencies/glfw/src/libglfw3.a voxel_engine/dependencies/lwgl/liblwgl.a voxel_engine/dependencies/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl voxel_engine/dependencies/libglad.a voxel_engine/dependencies/glm/glm/libglm.a voxel_engine/dependencies/SoLoud/libsoloud.a voxel_engine/dependencies/FastNoise2/src/libFastNoise.a
